keyMappings:
# start fresh
unmapAll
map <A-space> LinkHints.activateMode
map f LinkHints.activateMode
map F LinkHints.activateModeToOpenInNewTab
map q LinkHints.activateModeWithQueue

# find tool
map / enterFindMode
map n performFind
map N performBackwardsFind

# scrolling
map gg scrollToTop
map gj scrollDown
map gk scrollUp
map gG scrollToBottom

#marks
map m Marks.activateCreateMode
map M Marks.activateGotoMode

# history
map H goBack
map L goForward

# zoom
map o zoomIn
map O zoomOut
map go zoomReset
